negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_e1607e76-10e8-40d2-ab27-d8858f619f5b
prompt: A dynamic video captures climbers atop a majestic mountain range under a clear blue sky dotted with fluffy white clouds. The scene opens with a woman with braided blonde hair in two pigtails, secured with black hair ties, standing amidst rugged, rocky terrain. She wears a light blue vest over a black long-sleeved shirt and an unsecured blue headgear with a black object attached to the top, along with a gray and white bandana beneath it. As she interacts with a man dressed in black, who holds a white-and-black water bottle in his right hand and an object in his left, she gently touches her hair, first her right pigtail and then her left, before turning to face the camera and continuing their conversation. The man, wearing a secured white-colored helmet with a pink bandana, initially looks at her but then shifts his gaze downward and to his left as she turns to address the camera. Afterward, he looks back at her. Behind them, another climber in a green top, scarf, and secured headgear is seen drinking from a bottle. The camera begins with random motion, gradually transitioning to a steady arc shot, focusing on a medium shot at an eye-level angle that captures the woman and her interaction with the man in black. The expansive landscape stretches out, showcasing the sharp contrasts between the rugged rocks and the serene sky. Bright natural light illuminates the scene, highlighting the details of the climbers' gear and the surrounding environment. An orange rope lies on the ground near the group, and a black metallic structure is visible to the right, adding to the sense of adventure and exploration.
